Thesis: India's largest integrated private power utility mid-pivot from coal to 70% renewable capacity by 2030. Real long-horizon growth thesis (23 GW TPREL target, data-centre demand tailwind, CRISIL AA+), but trailing ROIC ~10-11%, deeply negative FCF (-₹7,677 Cr FY26), fast-rising debt (₹76,141 Cr), and Q4 FY26 PAT miss mean the stock at ₹402 is pricing-in execution the company has not yet delivered. Wait for FCF inflection and/or meaningful price correction into MoS zone.
